description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a large, rectangular head made of weathered, cracked gray stone or metal, reinforced with metallic plates and rivets. The head features a square, slightly beveled striking face and a central metallic accent on each side, giving it a reinforced, industrial look. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of metal with a bronze or brass finish, featuring several ridges and rings for grip enhancement. The overall design suggests durability and strength, suitable for demolition or heavy construction tasks. The surface of the hammer head shows visible cracks and wear, indicating extensive use or intentional aging for aesthetic effect. No visible branding or accessories are present, and the hammer exudes a rugged, utilitarian character.
description: A rugged, heavy sledgehammer with a cracked, reinforced gray head and a long, ridged bronze metal handle. The hammer shows signs of wear and is built for strength and durability.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown at an angle, highlighting the cracked, gray head with metallic rivets and the long, bronze handle with grip rings.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the square striking face and central metallic accent, emphasizing the head's reinforced structure.
description_view_2: This angled view displays the opposite side of the head, again showing cracks and rivets, and the full length of the handle.
description_view_3: A direct side view of the hammer, focusing on the length of the handle and the rectangular profile of the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical metal handle with a bronze finish, featuring multiple ridges and rings for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledgehammer head, made of cracked gray stone or metal, reinforced with metallic plates and rivets, with a flat striking face.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible cracks and surface wear on the hammer head, suggesting heavy use or intentional aging.
